headline: Six chic ways to wear a belt
summary: Updating your look is a cinch this season
body_text:
The tie that bindsUlla Johnson cotton, linen and silk belted Ellery jacket, £840, and matching Pollina trousers, £610

What’s the link?Chanel silk/satin embroidered jacket with jewelled buttons, £8,990, metal and strass belt, £4,695, and embossed denim trousers, £3,740

Don’t forget your scarfHermès combed cashmere/mohair Crombie coat with integrated wool flannel double scarf, £3,400

Speaking in codeGucci froissé viscose satin shirt, £1,000, and leather-panelled belted miniskirt with horsebit detail, £3,610

Go the extra mileLouis Vuitton wool draped jacket, £7,050, matching jumpsuit, £4,300, and leather Biface 20mm belt, £355

Corset dramaMax Mara camel-hair and silk Teddy coat, £3,370, handsewn double-faced broadcloth dress, £1,150, leather belt, £810, and wool yarn turtleneck, £350

Model, Marilou Hanriot at Ford. Casting, Chouaïb Arif. Hair, Sachi Yamashita at Saint Germain. Make-up, Hicham Ababsa. Nails, Philippe Ovak at Marie‑France Thavonekham
